spec_trace.roadmap_pointer: Handshake_Master_Spec_v02.144.md 7.6.3 (Phase 1) -> [ADD v02.144] Second-pass feature-family coverage / coverage sweep

draft_scope.intent:
- What: Backfill Decks as a governed composition/export surface with explicit slide sources, runtime identity, and operator evidence.
- Why: Decks are a natural force multiplier over Docs, Charts, and Project Brain, but current appendix coverage is too sparse.
draft_scope.scope_sketch:
- IN_SCOPE:
  - DeckSpec runtime coverage.
  - Source-linking from docs/charts.
- OUT_OF_SCOPE:
  - Final deck-authoring UX polish.
  - Broad presentation design system work.
draft_scope.acceptance_criteria:
- Decks have explicit runtime mapping and source-linking coverage.
- Appendix coverage makes deck generation deterministic for later model/tool use.
draft_scope.risks_unknowns: - Risk: deck output becomes detached from source evidence and impossible to reason over later.

assumptions_to_attack: A stub is planning metadata, not execution authority.
Stub Markdown may contain stale draft scope until activated through a signed packet.
Apps must not treat stub contracts as runnable work packets.
minimum_controls: Require official packet contract before Coder or Validator launch.
Fail drift checks when stub Markdown changes without contract regeneration.
